response.justification: Candidate has 16+ years of broad software engineering experience and strong fundamentals, but the role specifically requires hands-on senior C++ development with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis using C++; the bulk of recent work is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang in web, ad-tech, and direct-mail domains with no industrial automation, OT protocols, or SDL/IEC 62443 exposure.
strengths: Long track record (16+ yrs) across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded work
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring, public workshops
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency, asynchronous systems (Sociomantic) transferable to performance-critical work
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No demonstrated exposure to industrial automation, MQTT, Modbus/OPC UA, or IEC 62443 / SDL practices
No evidence of message-broker-based architectures or IoT platform delivery in the listed roles

key_factors.factor: Solid senior-level engineering breadth and tenure
